titles.title: Chafee Opportunities for New Networks and Existing Connection Trust Act
CONNECT Act
Chafee Opportunities for New Networks and Existing Connection Trust Act
CONNECT Act
CONNECT Act

To update the purposes of the John H. Chafee Foster Care Program for Successful Transition to Adulthood to reflect research and the input of youth with lived experience about the importance of long-term relationships to future success.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute by the Yeas and Nays: 40 - 0.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Ways and Means. H. Rept. 119-642.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 559.

committee.name: House Ways and Means
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
